reasoning: The control AC-6(10) focuses on enforcing least privilege by prohibiting non-privileged users from executing privileged functions. In Kubernetes, this directly maps to RBAC configurations where roles and bindings must be carefully managed to ensure that only authorized users have access to privileged actions. The functions generated focus on ensuring no excessive privileges are granted through cluster-admin bindings, enforcing least privilege across roles, and ensuring service accounts are not over-privileged.
title: Least Privilege - Least privilege | prohibit non - privileged users from executing privileged func
